name: sovereign-web-scraper-mcp
description: MCP server for web scraping — fetch URLs, extract text/links/metadata, CSS selector extraction. Zero deps, LLM-optimized output.

tools.name: scrape_url
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return clean, LLM-optimized text content (strips ads, nav, scripts).

tools.name: scrape_links
tools.description: Extract all links from a URL. Returns unique URLs found on the page.

tools.name: scrape_structured
tools.description: Extract content matching CSS-like selectors (tag, class, id) from a URL.

tools.name: scrape_meta
tools.description: Extract metadata (title, description, Open Graph tags, canonical URL) from a page.
